description_zh: 将任何内容融入奇幻魔法世界的视觉语言中，充满瑰丽的想象力和史诗感。适合创作充满龙、魔法、中世纪城堡等元素的幻想世界场景。
description_en: Immerses any content into the visual language of a fantastical magical world, brimming with magnificent imagination and epic grandeur. Perfect for crafting scenes filled with dragons, sorcery, medieval castles, and otherworldly landscapes.
template_prompt: Reimagine {content} in a high-fantasy art style. Place the subject within an enchanted realm featuring towering ancient castles in the distance, luminous magical runes floating in the air, and a dramatic sky swirling with auroras and distant moons. Use rich jewel-tone colors of emerald, amethyst, and gold. Add atmospheric fog, volumetric god rays piercing through mystical forests, and subtle particle effects of glowing magical dust. Render in a painterly digital art style with cinematic epic composition.

description_zh: 专注于角色概念设计的专业风格，提供多角度展示和细节标注。适合游戏角色、动画人物和IP形象的前期视觉开发，输出可直接用于制作流程。
description_en: A professional style focused on character concept design, offering multi-angle views and detail annotations. Ideal for visual development of game characters, animation figures, and IP mascots, producing output ready for production pipelines.
template_prompt: Create a professional character design sheet for {content}. Present the character in a turnaround view showing front, three-quarter, and side poses on a neutral light-gray background. Include close-up callouts for distinctive features like face, accessories, and costume elements. Add a color palette swatch strip below, annotation labels for key design choices, and expression thumbnails showing different emotions. Use crisp line art with flat cel-shaded coloring suitable for animation or game production.

description_zh: 模拟专业摄影的真实质感和光影效果，追求照片级的逼真度。涵盖人像、风光、产品等多种摄影题材，呈现如同高端相机实拍的视觉效果。
description_en: Simulates the authentic texture and lighting of professional photography, pursuing photo-level realism. Covers portrait, landscape, product, and other photographic genres, delivering visuals indistinguishable from high-end camera captures.
template_prompt: Capture {content} as a stunning professional photograph with absolute photorealism. Use natural golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field creating creamy bokeh, and precise focus on the primary subject. Apply subtle film grain for organic texture, accurate material rendering, and balanced rule-of-thirds composition. Simulate a full-frame camera with an 85mm prime lens at f/1.8, delivering rich dynamic range, true-to-life colors, and fine micro-detail in textures like fabric, metal, and skin.
